sections.title: World Briefing
entries: Sharuan is divided into Castle heights, Town center, and Southern Docks.
Weathered ruins and old roads often hide side objectives and rare loot.
Fast travel is not active yet, so route planning matters.

sections.title: Combat Notes
entries: Light attacks keep pressure, heavy attacks break guards.
Parry windows are short; block first, then counter.
Magic can finish enemies outside melee range.

sections.title: Enemy Intel
entries: Goblins are fast but fragile; punish their approach.
Shadows attack from mid-range with dark projectiles.
Fire elementals control area with sustained burn damage.
Golems are armored and serve as boss-tier threats.

sections.title: Boss Protocol
entries: Warden Golem uses heavy single hits and brief guard windows.
Titan Golem is slower but has higher armor and damage.
Keep stamina for evade timing during their attack wind-up.

sections.title: Controls Reminder
entries: I opens inventory and journal tabs.
F5/F6/F7 save to slots, Shift+F5/F6/F7 load slots.
F9 cycles test locations in development builds.
Hold TAB (or your bound key) to open the skill wheel, hover with mouse, release to equip.

sections.title: Checkpoint & Quest Flow
entries: Tracked objectives show distance in HUD and a world checkpoint marker.
Reach objectives complete automatically when you enter their radius.
Interact objectives require pressing your interaction key near the target NPC/anchor.

sections.title: Mounts & Travel
entries: Mount hints appear near valid vehicles and mounts.
Different mount types can use dedicated mount/dismount animations.
Use test profiles (mounts/music/dragon/journal/skills) to verify isolated systems quickly.

sections.title: Biomes & Audio Routing
entries: Music routes by state: menu -> exploration -> combat -> boss.
Ambient routes by location and biome, then reacts to water/flying states.
Crossfades prevent layer overlap; short SFX cooldowns reduce spam in heavy combat.
